symptom_description: Boiler efficiency dropped from 86% to 79% over 2 weeks
root_cause: Air preheater tube fouling due to high sulphur coal ash
resolution: Chemical cleaning of APH tubes + coal quality adjustment

symptom_description: Unit fails to reach set temperature — flame instability observed
root_cause: Blocked fuel nozzle + incorrect combustion air damper setting
resolution: Nozzle cleaning + damper recalibration per SOP-TF-03

symptom_description: Water wall tube leak detected — emergency shutdown
root_cause: Erosion at soot blower impingement zone — wall thinning below 3mm
resolution: Tube replacement + soot blower realignment + NDT inspection
spare_parts_used: Water wall tubes x4 + welding rods

symptom_description: SO2 levels exceeding 200 mg/Nm3 against limit of 100
root_cause: Slurry recirculation pump cavitation — low pH in scrubber
resolution: Pump impeller replacement + limestone dosing adjustment

symptom_description: Chilled water outlet temp 12°C vs design 7°C — capacity loss
root_cause: Crystallization in absorber due to excess vacuum loss
resolution: Decrystallization procedure + vacuum pump seal replacement

symptom_description: ID fan vibration exceeding 8 mm/s — tripping on high alarm
resolution: Bearing replacement + dynamic balancing + impeller cleaning

symptom_description: Heat transfer coefficient dropped 40% — heavy scaling observed
root_cause: Suspected calcium sulphate scaling from feed water quality
resolution: Acid cleaning scheduled + feed water pretreatment review

symptom_description: Hot spots observed on furnace casing — refractory spalling
root_cause: Thermal cycling stress + inadequate curing during last repair
resolution: Gunning repair of damaged zones + controlled heat-up schedule

symptom_description: DCS communication loss — intermittent control loop failures
root_cause: Corroded terminal strips in marshalling cabinet due to humidity
resolution: Terminal strip replacement + cabinet dehumidifier installed

symptom_description: Coal feeder jamming frequently — bed temperature fluctuations
root_cause: Wet coal causing bridging in bunker + worn feeder screws
resolution: Bunker vibrator installation + feeder screw replacement pending

symptom_description: Thermic fluid turning dark — suspected carbon residue formation
root_cause: Operating temperature exceeded fluid limit by 15°C intermittently
resolution: Partial fluid replacement + high-temp alarm setpoint correction

symptom_description: Carryover of slurry droplets into clean gas duct
root_cause: Mist eliminator wash nozzles clogged + blade deformation
resolution: Nozzle replacement + blade section renewal scheduled

symptom_description: Solution pump mechanical seal failure — fluid leak
root_cause: Seal face wear due to crystallized solution particles
resolution: Seal replacement + strainer installation on pump suction

symptom_description: Bottom ash cooler screw conveyor seized — ash removal stopped
root_cause: Clinker formation due to high ash fusion temperature coal batch
resolution: Conveyor bearing + screw flight replacement + coal blend adjustment

symptom_description: Economizer finned tube leak — feedwater loss observed
root_cause: Dew point corrosion — flue gas temp below acid dew point
resolution: Tube plugging + economizer bypass + minimum load procedure update
